title: Create harness starter archive
request: Package the completed harness engineering initial files into a separate zip for future project setup, excluding existing LandinHub web service files.
success_criteria: A zip archive is created in a clear archive/download location.
The archive includes harness initialization files and operational documents needed to bootstrap a new harness project.
The archive excludes LandinHub web service implementation files.
The archive excludes secrets and environment files such as .env and .dev.vars.
The archive contents are verified after creation.

positive: Prefer existing repository structure and files.
Keep the task scoped to archive creation and required work-history records.
negative: Do not include LandinHub application files.
Do not include secrets, credentials, or local runtime state.
Do not modify unrelated source files.
